title: follow_requests N+1 query for remote accounts
description: interactions.rs follow_requests() fetches all pending follow requests, then loops over each one issuing a separate 'SELECT ... FROM remote_accounts WHERE id = ?' query. Use a JOIN in the initial query instead: 'SELECT fr.id, ra.id, ra.username, ra.domain, ra.display_name, ra.bio_html FROM follow_requests fr JOIN remote_accounts ra ON fr.requester_remote_id = ra.id WHERE fr.target_account_id = ?'
close_reason: Deferred: performance optimization for rare endpoint.
